# Welcome to The People Lab! {.unnumbered}

The People Lab (TPL) is a research lab based at the Harvard Kennedy School, led by Professor Elizabeth Linos. We partner with government agencies to improve the experience of working in and interacting with government through rigorous research and randomized controlled trials.

This manual is both a work in progress and a working document. We will do our best to make updates regularly. Please let us know if you have suggestions or modifications!

*Last updated: June 2026*

## How to use this manual

Use the chapters on the left to navigate. If you are new to TPL, start with **Welcome & Getting Started**. If you are on the ops and admin team, see the **Ops & Admin** chapter for processes specific to your role.

## Status indicators

Throughout this manual you'll see the following indicators:

- 🚧 Sections that are usable but still under construction
- 🛑 Sections that haven't been started or aren't yet usable
- 🔔 New content
